General.Name: Geotech Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Geotech Holdings Ltd., an investment holding company, provides construction and engineering services, and property-related services in Hong Kong. The company undertakes slope work contracts and ground investigation activities. It also undertakes landslip preventive/remedial works to slopes/retaining walls; site formation works; and general civil works, including geotechnical and ground investigation field works. In addition, the company provides property management consultancy; property leasing agency services; trading, design, and engineering; and decoration services. Further, it is involved in the sale of luxury products. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Kwai Chung, Hong Kong. Geotech Holdings Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Star Merit Global Limited.
General.Address: Tower II, Metroplaza, Kwai Chung, Hong Kong
